note: C26 oxidase: acyl-CoA + O2 -> enoyl-CoA + H2O2
C18 FAD-DH: acyl-CoA + FAD -> enoyl-CoA + FADH2
C26 hydratase: H2O + enoyl <-> 3-OH; written this way -> degradation FORWARD
C18 hydratase: written as 3-OH -> H2O + enoyl, degradation reverse
C26 3-OH-DH: NAD + 3-OH <-> NADH + H+ + 3-oxo; degradation forward
C18 3-OH-DH: NADH + H+ + 3-oxo <-> NAD + 3-OH; degradation reverse
C8 3-OH-DH (V1 added): NAD + 3-OH <-> NADH + H+ + 3-oxo; forward
C16->C14 thiolase: AcCoA + C14 <-> CoA + 3-oxoC16; degradation reverse
C4 terminal thiolase: 2 AcCoA <-> CoA + acetoacetyl-CoA; degradation reverse
galU/H+ symport: H+_e0 + galU_e0 <-> H+_c0 + galU_c0; only import
GAR1: NADP + L-galactonate <-> NADPH + H+ + galU; degradation reverse (galU + NADPH -> L-galactonate)
LGA1: KDG <-> pyruvate + L-glyceraldehyde; degradation forward (cleavage)
GLD1: NADPH + H+ + L-glyceraldehyde <-> NADP + glycerol; degradation forward (reduce)
